heading: Interest received in action to recover property seized by the Internal Revenue Service based on structuring transaction
label: 139H Interest received in action to recover property seized by the Internal Revenue Service based on structuring transaction
text: Gross income shall not include any interest received from the Federal Government in connection with an action to recover property seized by the Internal Revenue Service pursuant to , United States Code, by reason of a claimed violation of section 5324 of such title.section 5317(c)(2) of title 31
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–25, title I, § 1202(c)133 Stat. 988July 1, 2019“The amendments made by this section [enacting this section] shall apply to interest received on or after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”July 1, 2019
